rules.summary: Unless otherwise stated, this Part applies to every firm.
In this Part, the following definitions shall apply:

sections.chapter_title: Applications to Vary and Cancel Part 4A Permission

rules.summary: This Chapter applies to every firm that wishes to:
The PRA directs that a firm other than a credit union wishing to make an application to vary or cancel a Part 4A permission apply online using the form specified on the ONA system , unless o
Where the ONA system fails and is unavailable for 24 hours or more, the PRA directs that a firm which is required to make an application in the manner set out in [2.2](/pra-rules/permissions-and
The PRA directs that a credit union wishing to make an application to vary or cancel a Part 4A permission submit the relevant form on the PRA’s website using one of the alternative ways set ou
Where a firm has applied for cancellation of its Part 4A permission , it must demonstrate to the PRA that it has ceased or will cease carrying on all regulated activities.

sections.chapter_title: Applications to Impose, Vary and Cancel Requirements

rules.summary: This Chapter applies to every firm that wishes to:
The PRA directs that a firm other than a credit union wishing to make an application to impose, vary or cancel a requirement apply online using the form specified on the ONA system , unless
Where the ONA system fails and is unavailable for 24 hours or more, the PRA directs that a firm which is required to make an application under [3.2](/pra-rules/permissions-and-waivers/03-03-2026
The PRA directs that a credit union wishing to make an application to impose, vary or cancel a requirement submit the relevant form on the PRA’s website using one of the alternative ways set o
This Chapter applies to every firm or person who is subject to PRA rules.
The PRA directs that a firm or person wishing to apply for a waiver must complete the relevant form on the PRA’s website and submit it in the way set out in [Notifications 7.4](/pra-rules/no

sections.chapter_title: Changes to Information, Additional Information and Notification of Altered Circumstances

rules.summary: Until an application under this Part has been determined, a firm or person who submits the application must immediately notify the PRA of any significant change to the information provided in th
A firm or person which has applied for or has been granted a waiver must immediately notify the PRA if it becomes aware of any matter which could affect the continuing relevance or appropriate
